certifications.title: SEBI Registered Investment Advisor
certifications.description: Registered with the Securities and Exchange Board of India as a qualified Investment Advisor (RIA). Registration No: INA200017566.

certifications.title: AMFI Certified Mutual Fund Distributor
certifications.description: Certified by the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI) with ARN No: 73991. Qualified to advise on all mutual fund categories.

certifications.title: Certified Financial Planner (CFP)
certifications.description: CFP certification — the global gold standard in financial planning — held by our lead advisors, ensuring comprehensive goal based financial planning expertise.

certifications.title: CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst)
certifications.description: CFA certification held by our research team, demonstrating advanced expertise in investment analysis, portfolio management, and financial ethics.

certifications.title: NISM Certifications
certifications.description: Multiple NISM certifications across Series V-A (Mutual Fund Distributors), Series X-A (Investment Adviser), and other modules held by our advisory team.

certifications.title: MBA in Finance
certifications.description: Post graduate degrees in Finance from reputed institutions, providing our team with deep theoretical foundations in corporate finance, investments, and risk management.
